testcase.name: test_user_login_api_success

error.message: failed on setup with "NameError: name 'GlobalVars' is not defined"

testcase.error: Scripts\API\test_user_login_api.py:35: in api_setup user_api = UserAPI(GlobalVars.BASE_URL) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ api_helper = <helper.api_helper.APIHelper object at 0x00000210552D0D50> self = <Scripts.API.test_user_login_api.TestUserLoginAPI object at 0x0000021053B98F50> Objects\API\user_api.py:42: in __init__ GlobalVars.load_config(environment="standard") ^^^^^^^^^^ E NameError: name 'GlobalVars' is not defined base_url = 'https://standard-f1-carity.feisystemsh2env.com/' self = <Objects.API.user_api.UserAPI object at 0x0000021053B27230>
